svg.title: TubeWhiz architecture diagram
svg.desc: Flow from YouTube URL through audio processing, transcription, summarization, embedding, FAISS index, and RAG chat

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does yt-dlp download YouTube audio?')
sendPrompt('How does pydub split audio into chunks?')
sendPrompt('How does Groq Whisper transcription work?')
sendPrompt('What LLM providers does TubeWhiz support for summarization?')
sendPrompt('How does SentenceTransformer embedding work in TubeWhiz?')
sendPrompt('How does FAISS IndexFlatL2 work for semantic search?')
sendPrompt('How does the RAG retrieval work in TubeWhiz?')
sendPrompt('Explain the full RAG pipeline in TubeWhiz')
